title: Increase the board limit in dashboards
excerpt: We cannot create an overview of all our projects because of the board limit. Please increase the board limits. We cannot upgrade plan just to get something so basic as the ability to overview all boards in a project.

posts.author: jeppef (Jeppe Fastrup)
posts.cookedHtml: We cannot create an overview of all our projects because of the board limit. Please increase the board limits. We cannot upgrade plan just to get something so basic as the ability to overview all boards in a project.

posts.author: Jordi_Aparicio (Jordi Aparicio Corbella)
posts.cookedHtml: @jeppef have you tried creating a board that links and sums up the information from other boards? We are currently using this system to get an overview of our projects.

posts.author: parisvega (Paris Vega)
posts.cookedHtml: Same. Need an executive level overall view of what’s going on.

posts.author: Simon_Loge (Simon Logé)
posts.cookedHtml: how excatly? how do you implement this solution?

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml: Guess Monday would have a lot more enterprise subscribers if the pricing wasn’t so steep from the Pro tier.
